---
pagetitle: "KY-Publications"
title: " "
echo: false
jupyter: python3
section-divs: true
toc: false
toc-location: right
toc-expand: true
toc-title: " "
execute:
  cache: false
---

# Publication

<style>

.publication-search {
  width: 100%;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}

#pub-search {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.6rem 0.9rem;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid #d0d7de;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color 0.15s ease;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

#pub-search:focus {
  border-color: #0969da;
}

</style>

```{python}
#| label: install-packages
#| echo: false
#| results: "hide"
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import importlib
import subprocess
import sys

def ensure(import_name, pip_name=None):
    pip_name = pip_name or import_name
    try:
        return importlib.import_module(import_name)
    except ModuleNotFoundError:
        subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install", pip_name])
        return importlib.import_module(import_name)

pd = ensure("pandas")
yaml = ensure("yaml", "pyyaml")
itables = ensure("itables")
```

```{python}
#| label: load-data-and-build-table
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

from datetime import date
from html import escape
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from itables import show
from itables import options as opt

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load centralized author URLs
# ------------------------------------------------------------
with open("list_authors.yaml", "r") as f:
    author_yaml = yaml.safe_load(f) or {}

centralized_author_urls = author_yaml.get("author_urls", {})

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load publication records
# Expected publication types:
#   - journal
#   - conference
#   - preprint
# ------------------------------------------------------------
with open("list_publication.yaml", "r") as f:
    yaml_data = yaml.safe_load(f) or {}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Small helpers
# ------------------------------------------------------------
def normalize_url(value):
    if value is None:
        return None
    value = str(value).strip()
    return value if value else None

def display_author(name):
    if name == "me":
        return "<strong>KY</strong>"
    safe_name = escape(str(name))
    url = centralized_author_urls.get(name)
    if url:
        return (
            f"<a href='{escape(url, quote=True)}' target='_blank' "
            f"rel='noopener noreferrer'>{safe_name}</a>"
        )
    return safe_name

def readable_authors(authors):
    vals = [display_author(a) for a in authors]
    if len(vals) == 0:
        return ""
    if len(vals) == 1:
        return vals[0]
    if len(vals) == 2:
        return f"{vals[0]} and {vals[1]}"
    return f"{', '.join(vals[:-1])}, and {vals[-1]}"

def type_badge(flag):
    mapping = {
        "journal": ("Journal", "#0d6efd"),
        "conference": ("Conference", "#198754"),
        "preprint": ("Preprint", "#6c757d"),
    }
    label, color = mapping.get(flag, (str(flag).title(), "#6c757d"))
    return (
        f"<span style='display:inline-block; padding:0.20rem 0.55rem; "
        f"border-radius:999px; font-size:0.80rem; font-weight:600; "
        f"color:white; background:{color};'>{label}</span>"
    )

def icon_link(url, label, icon_class):
    url = normalize_url(url)
    if not url:
        return ""
    return (
        f"<a href='{escape(url, quote=True)}' target='_blank' "
        f"rel='noopener noreferrer' title='{escape(label, quote=True)}' "
        f"style='margin-right:0.55rem; text-decoration:none; font-size:1.05rem;'>"
        f"<i class='{icon_class}' aria-label='{escape(label, quote=True)}'></i>"
        f"</a>"
    )

def build_work_cell(item):
    title = escape(item.get("title", ""))
    authors = readable_authors(item.get("authors", []))
    venue = item.get("venue")
    flag = str(item.get("flag", "")).strip().lower()

    title_html = f"<span style='font-weight:700;'>{title}</span>"

    blocks = []
    blocks.append(
        f"<div style='line-height:1.35; margin-bottom:0.18rem;'>{title_html}</div>"
    )

    if authors:
        blocks.append(
            f"<div style='line-height:1.40; margin-bottom:0.18rem;'>{authors}</div>"
        )

    if flag in ("journal", "conference") and venue:
        blocks.append(
            f"<div style='line-height:1.35; color:#666;'><em>{escape(str(venue))}</em></div>"
        )

    return "".join(blocks)


def build_links_cell(item):
    links = [
        icon_link(item.get("published_url"), "Publisher", "bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"),
        icon_link(item.get("preprint"), "Preprint", "bi bi-journal-text"),
        icon_link(item.get("github"), "Code", "bi bi-github"),
    ]
    links = [x for x in links if x]

    if not links:
        return "<span style='color:#aaa;'>—</span>"
    return "".join(links)

def type_sort_value(flag):
    order = {"journal": 1, "conference": 2, "preprint": 3}
    return order.get(flag, 99)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build rows
# ------------------------------------------------------------
rows = []
n_journal = 0
n_conference = 0
n_preprint = 0

for _, item in yaml_data.items():
    flag = str(item.get("flag", "")).strip().lower()
    year = item.get("year", "")

    if flag == "journal":
        n_journal += 1
    elif flag == "conference":
        n_conference += 1
    elif flag == "preprint":
        n_preprint += 1

    rows.append(
        {
            "Year": year,
            "Type": type_badge(flag),
            "Work": build_work_cell(item),
            "Links": build_links_cell(item),
            "_type_sort": type_sort_value(flag),
        }
    )

df = pd.DataFrame(rows)

if not df.empty:
    df = df.sort_values(
        by=["Year", "_type_sort", "Work"],
        ascending=[False, True, True]
    ).reset_index(drop=True)

display_df = df[["Year", "Type", "Work", "Links"]] if not df.empty else pd.DataFrame(
    columns=["Year", "Type", "Work", "Links"]
)
```

```{python}
#| label: publication-summary-line
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

today_str = date.today().strftime("%B %d, %Y")
total_count = n_journal + n_conference + n_preprint

msg = (
    f"As of {today_str}, there are "
    f"{n_journal} journal "
    f"{'article' if n_journal == 1 else 'articles'}, "
    f"{n_conference} conference "
    f"{'paper' if n_conference == 1 else 'papers'}, and "
    f"{n_preprint} "
    f"{'preprint' if n_preprint == 1 else 'preprints'}. "
    "In the Links column, "
    "<i class='bi bi-box-arrow-up-right'></i> denotes the publisher’s webpage, "
    "<i class='bi bi-journal-text'></i> denotes the preprint version, and "
    "<i class='bi bi-github'></i> denotes the code repository."
)

display(Markdown(msg))
```

<div class="publication-search">
<input id="pub-search" type="text" placeholder="Search publications..." />
</div>

```{python}
#| label: publication-interactive-table
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Global DataTables / itables options
opt.classes = "display compact"
opt.pageLength = len(display_df) if len(display_df) > 0 else 25
opt.lengthMenu = [len(display_df)] if len(display_df) > 0 else [25]
opt.searching = True
opt.ordering = True
opt.info = False
opt.paging = False
opt.autoWidth = False
opt.responsive = True

show(
    display_df,
    allow_html=True,
    escape=False,
    order=[[0, "desc"], [1, "asc"]],
    dom="tip",
    language={
        "search": "",
        "searchPlaceholder": "Search publications..."
    },
    columnDefs=[
        {
            "targets": 0,
            "width": "8%",
            "className": "dt-center"
        },
        {
            "targets": 1,
            "width": "12%",
            "className": "dt-center"
        },
        {
            "targets": 2,
            "width": "65%",
            "className": "dt-left"
        },
        {
            "targets": 3,
            "width": "15%",
            "className": "dt-center",
            "orderable": False,
            "searchable": False
        },
    ],
)
```

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

  const input = document.getElementById("pub-search");

  const interval = setInterval(() => {
    const table = document.querySelector(".dataTable");

    if (!table || !table.DataTable) return;

    const dt = $(table).DataTable();

    input.addEventListener("keyup", function () {
      dt.search(this.value).draw();
    });

    clearInterval(interval);
  }, 200);

});
</script>
